file_title: Lee's Market: North Carolina Expansion Analysis
introduction: This presentation will focus on the expansion progress of Lee's Market in the North Carolina region. We will review the store presence, growth trends, and the competitive landscape to contextualize our performance.

subsections.heading: Lee's Market: Growth Trends in North America
subsections.content:
• Lee's Market expanded its operations to the United States in 2015
• In the last decade, the company has recorded a 15% CAGR in North America
• Expansion has been largely driven by our focus on organic and locally sourced products
• As of Q3 2025, our presence spans across 15 states in the US
• 60% of our American stores are located in the East Coast
• Our West Coast operations have registered the highest growth rate
subsections.justification: The slide provides general growth information about Lee's Market in North America but does not specify the number of stores in North Carolina.

subsections.heading: Store Presence in North Carolina: Q3 2025 Update
subsections.content:
• Our North Carolina operations are primarily located in urban areas
• The average store size in North Carolina is 25,000 sq ft
• We serve an average of 1,000 customers daily in each of our North Carolina stores
• Our North Carolina stores focus heavily on fresh produce and baked goods
• We have seen a 20% increase in sales from our North Carolina stores over the last year
subsections.justification: This slide gives details about the operations in North Carolina but does not mention the number of stores present.

subsections.heading: Competitive Retail Landscape in North Carolina
subsections.content:
• Major competitors in North Carolina include Walmart, Costco, and local grocery chains
• Walmart holds the largest market share of 30% in North Carolina
• Our unique focus on fresh, locally sourced goods differentiates us in the market
• Recent surveys show Lee's Market as the preferred choice among health-conscious consumers
• The overall retail market in North Carolina grew by 5% in Q3 2025
subsections.justification: This slide presents the competitive landscape in North Carolina, but it doesn't give any indication of Lee's Market's store count.

conclusion: Our expansion in North Carolina demonstrates significant progress in our North America growth strategy. Moving forward, we need to consider market trends and competitor activities in our expansion plans.
